title: Crispy Patacones Venezolanos
description: Crispy Patacones Venezolanos is a traditional Venezuelan dish that originated in the Andean region of South America. This recipe features a crispy exterior and a fluffy interior, perfect for snacking or as a side dish.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Cut the plantains into 1-inch pieces and remove any stems or eyes.
Fry the plantains in batches until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes per side.
Drain the plantains on paper towels and let cool slightly.
